summary: A captioned clip of a Department of Justice press conference. A man in a dark suit and orange tie speaks at a lectern bearing a DOJ seal, flanked by a woman in dark clothing and another woman, in front of U.S. and Florida flags and a state seal. A red title bar reads 'DOJ Indictment of Raul Castro: The U.S. and POTUS Do Not, and Will Not, Forget Its Citizens', with a White House logo at the bottom and burned-in captions.

script.scene: A man in a dark suit and orange tie speaks at a DOJ lectern between two women, before U.S. and Florida flags; title bar about the indictment.
The same scene continues with the caption 'The families of four murdered Americans'.

notable_text: DOJ Indictment of Raul Castro; The U.S. and POTUS Do Not, and Will Not, Forget Its Citizens; The WHITE HOUSE
